display.purpose: Hero name or page title — once per viewport.

title.purpose: Card titles, modal headers, project names.

label.purpose: Nav labels, kickers, stack chips, status badges.

shadows.name: glow-ambient
shadows.purpose: Hover glow on primary buttons and featured cards.

shadows.name: glow-strong
shadows.purpose: Single hero focal element per page maximum.

motion.name: fade-up
motion.purpose: Section entrance; disable transform when prefers-reduced-motion.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Single main CTA per section — cyan fill on void.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #00d4ff; color: #0a0a0f; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; padding: 12px 24px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #33ddff; box-shadow: 0 0 20px #00d4ff33; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #00d4ff; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: transparent; color: #00d4ff; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 12px 24px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.2s, color 0.2s, background 0.2s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: #00d4ff55; background: #00d4ff11; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #00d4ff; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Project Card
components.description: Featured work tile on portfolio grid.
components.html:
Infrastructure

Home Server System

Self-hosted stack with dynamic routing and local AI.

DockerFirebase
components.css: .ds-card { background: #111118; color: #f0f0f0; border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px; border: 1px solid #ffffff10; transition: box-shadow 0.2s, transform 0.2s; } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 0 20px #00d4ff33; transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-card-kicker { font-family: "JetBrains Mono", monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #888899; margin: 0 0 8px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 600; margin: 0 0 8px; line-height: 1.3; } .ds-card-desc { font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #888899; margin: 0 0 16px; max-width: 65ch; } .ds-card-chips { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px; } .ds-chip { font-family: "JetBrains Mono", monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; background: #1a1a24; color: #888899; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 4px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Contact or chat input on void surface.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; } .ds-field-label { font-family: "JetBrains Mono", monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; letter-spacing: 0.08em; color: #888899; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-input { background: #1a1a24; color: #f0f0f0; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; padding: 12px 16px; border: 1px solid #ffffff10; border-radius: 8px; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #888899; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #00d4ff; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #00d4ff44; }

components.name: Site Navigation
components.description: Top nav with mono labels and cyan active state.
components.html: HomePortfolioYZU
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; gap: 24px; align-items: center; padding: 16px 0; background: #111118; } .ds-nav-link { font-family: "JetBrains Mono", monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #888899; text-decoration: none; padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; transition: color 0.2s, border-color 0.2s; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #f0f0f0; } .ds-nav-link--active { color: #00d4ff; border-bottom-color: #00d4ff; } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #00d4ff; outline-offset: 4px; }

components.name: Tech Stack Chip
components.description: Mono tag for stack items on cards and hero.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-block; font-family: "JetBrains Mono", monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.04em; background: #1a1a24; color: #888899; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 4px; border: 1px solid #ffffff08; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Server online/offline — icon + label, not color alone.
components.css: .ds-status { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-family: "JetBrains Mono", monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.04em; color: #888899; } .ds-status-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: #4ade80; box-shadow: 0 0 8px #4ade8055; } .ds-status--online { color: #f0f0f0; }

narrative.overview:
A dark, precise developer portfolio skin: deep void backgrounds, monospace labels, and cyan as a rare signal—not wallpaper. The system reads like a well-tuned terminal or status dashboard at night: confident, technical, quietly glowing. Violet appears as secondary depth (gradients, tags, hover accents), never as a generic "AI startup" purple wash on white.

This is brand register design: hierarchy and glow sell competence; there is no app chrome, sidebar product shell, or dashboard density. Motion is polish (fade-up entrances, typing cursor, soft glow on hover)—not scroll choreography or spectacle.
keyCharacteristics: Void-layered backgrounds (#0a0a0f → #111118 → #1a1a24) instead of flat single black
Cyan accent (#00d4ff) reserved for CTAs, active nav, links, and glow—≤10% of any screen
Inter for UI type; JetBrains Mono for labels, stack tags, and code-adjacent metadata
Depth via tonal steps and glow shadows, not heavy drop shadows
Static-export friendly: CSS variables + Tailwind @theme, minimal decorative JS

rules.name: The Signal Rarity Rule
rules.body: Cyan appears on ≤10% of any screen—one primary button, one active nav item, or one hero accent. If everything glows, nothing does.

rules.name: The No White Canvas Rule
rules.body: Marketing surfaces stay on void neutrals. Do not introduce a white or light-gray full-page mode unless deliberately scoped (e.g. a printable YZU PDF export)—not the default site chrome.

rules.name: The Mono Metadata Rule
rules.body: JetBrains Mono is for labels, tags, timestamps, and stack strings—not long body copy.

rules.name: The One Display Rule
rules.body: Only one Display-sized line per viewport. Competing hero lines collapse hierarchy.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Cards and sections sit flat on void-raised/surface fills. Glow appears on hover, focus, or a single hero focal point—not on every container at rest.

rules.name: The No 2014 Shadow Rule
rules.body: If a shadow reads like a gray offset blob under a white card, it is forbidden on this system.

dos: Do use void-deep as the default page canvas and stack void-raised → void-surface for section and card depth.
Do reserve Signal Cyan for one primary CTA and active wayfinding per view.
Do use JetBrains Mono for stack tags, section labels, and code-adjacent UI.
Do honor prefers-reduced-motion—replace translate/glow animations with opacity fades.
Do keep body copy at 65–75ch max width on large screens.
Do pair server/status color with text or icons, never color alone.
donts: Don't ship a generic create-next-app / Vercel marketing clone layout or boilerplate hero.
Don't use purple-gradient-on-white "AI startup" landing tropes unrelated to this token system.
Don't adopt overly corporate consulting-site tone, stock-photo heroes, or lorem placeholder blocks in production.
Don't put busy dashboard or SaaS app-chrome (sidebars, dense tables) on marketing pages.
Don't flood the UI with cyan borders, glows, or violet full-bleed gradients.
Don't use heavy gray drop shadows under cards—they break the luminous-terminal aesthetic.
Don't set long paragraphs in JetBrains Mono or run multiple competing Display headlines on one screen.
